title: S&P 500 Rebounds as Anthropic’s Update Tempers AI Concerns
description: US stocks rebounded on Tuesday as AI startup Anthropic PBC said it was expanding the reach of its Claude chatbot to build partnerships in the software and services sectors.
content: US stocks rebounded on Tuesday as AI startup Anthropic PBC said it was expanding the reach of its Claude chatbot to build partnerships in the software and services sectors.
